arguments.Description: "Fix undefined 'white90' getter by replacing it with white.withOpacity(0.9)."
arguments.ReplacementContent: "                                color: isToday \n                                    ? const Color(0xFF27A770) \n                                    : (dark ? Colors.white.withOpacity(0.9) : Colors.black87),"
arguments.TargetContent: "                                color: isToday \n                                    ? const Color(0xFF27A770) \n                                    : (dark ? Colors.white90 : Colors.black87),"
